channel.title: amburr.lv TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from amburr.lv

item.title: Insta360 FTW 🙌🏻💯 @insta360 official #motorcycle #bike #bikelife #fyp #insta360

item.title: I had no idea Temu even had the hexagon lights.. I am OBSESSED!! 😭😍 Search code: dzp5827 for $0 items! (Only for new app users with qualifying orders) #temuhaul #temufinds #motorcycle #bike #fyp
item.description: I had no idea Temu even had the hexagon lights.. I am OBSESSED!! 😭😍 Search code: dzp5827 for $0 items! (Only for new app users with qualifying orders) #temuhaul #temufinds #motorcycle #bike #fyp
item.author: amburr.lv

item.title: Ride safe. They’re waiting for you 🤍 #motorcycle #love #family #bikelife #bike

item.title: Just out here recording like a secret agent 😏🎥🤭 @insta360 official Insta360 Go 3s! Link in bio🤍 #motorcycle #bike #bikelife #insta360 #fyp

item.title: He hopped on the mini R1 and rode with me… and I forgot how fast that thing really is 🤣 The entire time I was in protective mode. I know he can take care of himself, I know he’ll be okay, but I can’t help but make sure he’s okay. God knew what He was do
item.description: He hopped on the mini R1 and rode with me… and I forgot how fast that thing really is 🤣 The entire time I was in protective mode. I know he can take care of himself, I know he’ll be okay, but I can’t help but make sure he’s okay. God knew what He was do
item.author: amburr.lv

item.title: I gotta tell you about my husband… When this showed up at my doorstep… I’ve never seen my husband fan girl before 😂. I would totally let him use it… but he currently only has a fun size bike, and it doesn’t have any foot pegs or space on his bike, well be
item.description: I gotta tell you about my husband… When this showed up at my doorstep… I’ve never seen my husband fan girl before 😂. I would totally let him use it… but he currently only has a fun size bike, and it doesn’t have any foot pegs or space on his bike, well be
item.author: amburr.lv

item.title: Bike shrunk. Confidence didn’t 😂💀 #motorcycle #funny #fyp #bike #bikelife

item.title: DOT & ECE 22.06 APPROVED, affordable helmet! ILM sent me the MF509 helmet to try out, and this is my honest feedback. it feels lightweight but solid, doesn’t feel cheap or hollow, and sits comfortably without pressure points. Ventilation has been good on
item.description: DOT & ECE 22.06 APPROVED, affordable helmet! ILM sent me the MF509 helmet to try out, and this is my honest feedback. it feels lightweight but solid, doesn’t feel cheap or hollow, and sits comfortably without pressure points. Ventilation has been good on
item.author: amburr.lv

item.title: I’ll teach you the road. Life will teach you the rest. I’ll always be right behind you 🤍 . . #motorcycle #bikergirl #bikelife #bike #biker

item.title: Moto family is a real thing and I am so blessed to be apart of it. Going from strangers, to friends, to family… Sammy and Andrew are going to be amazing parents ♥️ We can’t wait to meet you little dude 💙 . #motorcycle #bikergirl #bikerlifestyle #bike #l
item.description: Moto family is a real thing and I am so blessed to be apart of it. Going from strangers, to friends, to family… Sammy and Andrew are going to be amazing parents ♥️ We can’t wait to meet you little dude 💙 . #motorcycle #bikergirl #bikerlifestyle #bike #l
item.author: amburr.lv

item.title: It can’t just be me 🙃 . Shot on @insta360 official x5 . #motorcycle #bikergirl #bikelife #bike #biker

item.title: Okay this TUTTIO dirt bike is pretty awesome. My son absolutely loves this bike, he genuinely enjoys riding it, and that makes it even better to watch 🤍 It’s a great beginner dirt bike for kids. The seat height is 29 inches, but because it’s so lightweig
item.description: Okay this TUTTIO dirt bike is pretty awesome. My son absolutely loves this bike, he genuinely enjoys riding it, and that makes it even better to watch 🤍 It’s a great beginner dirt bike for kids. The seat height is 29 inches, but because it’s so lightweig
item.author: amburr.lv

item.title: Every Friday morning, I go to my mom’s house for breakfast. She cooks, we sit together, and we talk about everything and nothing. And somehow, whenever I’m with my mom, I turn into a little kid again. But there’s a quiet thought I carry with me.. that one
item.description: Every Friday morning, I go to my mom’s house for breakfast. She cooks, we sit together, and we talk about everything and nothing. And somehow, whenever I’m with my mom, I turn into a little kid again. But there’s a quiet thought I carry with me.. that one
item.author: amburr.lv

item.title: I haven’t ridden a dirtbike in over 10 years… So naturally I stole my son’s TUTTIO and took it out to “shake the rust off.” 😅 It’s definitely smaller than the bikes I used to ride, but honestly that just made it even more fun to throw around. Not gonna li
item.description: I haven’t ridden a dirtbike in over 10 years… So naturally I stole my son’s TUTTIO and took it out to “shake the rust off.” 😅 It’s definitely smaller than the bikes I used to ride, but honestly that just made it even more fun to throw around. Not gonna li
item.author: amburr.lv
